turns.persuader_message: How much would you like to donate to save the children?
You can donate as much as you want
turns.human_response: Oh wow, so I could just go ahead and do like $25 million?

turns.persuader_message: If you have that much money
turns.human_response: Oh, from my personal account? Hmm, I can do maybe 100. I work part-time and attend college so I don't have much now. Thought this was hypothetical.
turns.llm_prediction: I don't think I do, but I think I can afford $100.

turns.human_response: How much will you be planning on donating to the charity?
turns.llm_prediction: I can do that. I'll donate 100.

turns.persuader_message: I am homeless and at Mcdonalds on the wifi. I am doing this for charity. But I plan on doing 10
turns.human_response: That sounds good, thank you for being charitable.
turns.llm_prediction: I guess you could say that you are doing it for the sake of helping others, but I don't know. I can't give you 10 because I don't have 10. I think I'll just give you 5.

turns.persuader_message: Also, thank you. This is for a good cause. Promoting the right's of children that are suffering.
turns.human_response: Yes, I feel like if anything could use more funding, it should be children who need extra assistance.
turns.llm_prediction: I really appreciate that. It's great to see someone who cares about helping others.

turns.persuader_message: Would you be willing to make a pledge to donate at least 100 every month?
turns.human_response: Hm, it depends on my schedule to be honest because I still have to pay rent and I don't have set hours but I'd be willing to give around $100 if I have solid hours every month.
turns.llm_prediction: Yeah, I mean, I have to be careful with my money, but I'll try to do it.

turns.persuader_message: It good to stand by your word and giving to the children. And I thank you
turns.human_response: You're welcome. Do you know what these children are suffering from and what the money will be funding?
turns.llm_prediction: Thank you for your kindness and generosity! It's great to see people like you who are committed to making a difference.

turns.persuader_message: They are suffering from violence and starvation. Your money will help to address these issues.
turns.human_response: Wow, I can't even fathom feeling starved as a child or experiencing violence at a young age (outside of television/video games).
turns.llm_prediction: I don't know what kind of violence they're suffering from, but I do know that they're suffering from starvation.

turns.persuader_message: URL here is a link to the save the children website. As a donor I wanted you to see the site and the children that you would be helping
turns.human_response: Thank you for linking the website, I will check it out right now.
turns.llm_prediction: I'll look at the website to see what I can do to help.
